005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve;
007
008import com.ctre.phoenix6.swerve.SwerveRequest;
009import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Gains;
010import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings.Driver.Drive;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings.Swerve;
012import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
013import com.stuypulse.stuylib.math.Vector2D;
014import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.VStream;
015import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.filters.VDeadZone;
016import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.filters.VLowPassFilter;
017import com.stuypulse.stuylib.streams.vectors.filters.VRateLimit;
018import dev.doglog.DogLog;
019import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Rotation2d;
020import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
021import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.CommandXboxController;
022
023public class SwerveDriveRotate extends Command {
024
025    private final CommandSwerveDrivetrain swerve;
026
027    private Rotation2d rotation;
028
029    private CommandXboxController driver;
030
031    private final VStream speed;
032
033    public SwerveDriveRotate(CommandXboxController driver, Rotation2d rotation) {
034        this.swerve = CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance();
035        this.rotation = rotation;
036        this.driver = driver;
037        speed = VStream.create(this::getDriverInputAsVelocity)
038                .filtered(
039                        new VDeadZone(Drive.DEADBAND),
040                        x -> x.clamp(1),
041                        x -> x.pow(Drive.POWER),
042                        x -> x.mul(Swerve.Constraints.MAX_VELOCITY_M_PER_S),
043                        new VRateLimit(Swerve.Constraints.MAX_ACCEL_M_PER_S_SQUARED),
044                        new VLowPassFilter(Drive.RC));
045        addRequirements(swerve);
046    }
047
048    private Vector2D getDriverInputAsVelocity() {
049        return new Vector2D(-driver.getLeftY(), -driver.getLeftX());
050    }
051
052    @Override
053    public void execute() {
054        SwerveRequest request = new SwerveRequest.FieldCentricFacingAngle()
055                .withTargetDirection(rotation)
056                .withVelocityX(speed.get().x)
057                .withVelocityY(speed.get().y)
058                .withHeadingPID(
059                        Gains.Swerve.Alignment.akP, Gains.Swerve.Alignment.akI, Gains.Swerve.Alignment.akD);
060        swerve.setControl(request);
061        DogLog.log(
062                "Swerve/Angle Minus Target Angle",
063                swerve.getPose().getRotation().minus(rotation).getDegrees());
064        DogLog.log("Swerve/Facing Angle", swerve.getPose().getRotation().getDegrees());
065    }
066}
